title: Pooch & Mutt - Senior Complete Bundle, Complete Senior Dry Dog Food 1.5kg, Variety Pack of Complete Wet Dog Food Dry Dog Food Topper 12x375g, Meaty Dog Treats Variety Set 3x120, 120 Poo Bags
features: Grain free food packed with natural goodness to keep your pooch feeling great both on the inside and out
A 12 pack assortment of wet dog food flavours to find the best for your dog, contains a new and improved recipe that includes local sourced fresh meat and vegetables from British farms
Tasty treats perfect for training and rewarding. suitable for all breeds and ages from 12 weeks old
Natural ingredients that do good and taste good too, to help look after dogs dental health
Free from grain, cereal, gluten, GM produce, artificial flavours, colours and preservatives
Fresh drinking water should be available at all times, more product details can be found below
